headline: Force Majeure
subhead: S&P -1.51% to 6,507 as Iraq halts oil exports. Brent tops $112. Russell enters correction. Fourth straight losing week.

headline: Dip Bought
subhead: S&P 500 -0.28% after erasing a 1% drop. Brent spiked to $119, reversed to $108 on Hormuz reopening. Fed holds, signals one cut. Gold -4.9%.

headline: Powell Puts Cuts on Ice
subhead: S&P 500 -1.37% as Fed holds, flags inflation risk from Iran war. PPI surges 0.7%. Brent tops $104. Gold -3.6%.

headline: Hormuz Hopes
subhead: S&P +1.02% to 6,700. Tanker crossings ease oil fears. Nvidia GTC lifts semis. VIX drops 13.5%. Bitcoin tops $74K.

headline: Markets at War
subhead: Day 4 of US-Israel-Iran conflict. S&P whipsaws. Oil surges. VIX spikes.

headline: The Market Exhaled
subhead: S&P +0.77%. Crypto rallies. ISM services surge. Oil flattens. VIX falls 10%.

headline: War Premium Returns
subhead: S&P −0.58%. Dow plunges 1.6%. Oil surges on tanker strike. Broadcom beats big after the bell.

headline: Payrolls Collapse
subhead: NFP −92,000. Oil breaks $90. VIX +25% to 29.66. S&P −1.36% for its worst week since October.

headline: Reversal of Fortune
subhead: Oil touches $119 overnight, then retreats. Trump signals war nearing completion. S&P erases 1.5% loss to close +0.81%.

headline: Holding Pattern
subhead: S&P −0.22%. Markets tread water ahead of CPI. Gold tops $5,200. Oil continues retreat from $119 peak.

headline: Calm Before the Storm
subhead: CPI in line at 2.4% — but pre-war data. Market fades as traders price the oil shock ahead. VLO +5.7%. SYK −3.0%.

headline: Credit Cracks Widen
subhead: Private credit stress spreads. Oil resumes climb. S&P −1.53%. Morgan Stanley caps withdrawals. FOMC next Wednesday.

headline: Three Weeks Red
subhead: S&P −0.61% to new 2026 low. Third straight losing week. Brent above $103. Q4 GDP revised down. GTC Monday. FOMC Wednesday.

headline: Quiet Bounce
subhead: S&P +0.27% as equities stabilize. Oil disruptions persist—Brent above $100, diesel crosses $5. VIX eases to 22.38.
